versions.version_description: Contains the intro in standard tuning and works well with an acoustic guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing

content:
[tab][Intro]
   [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]B/D#[/ch] [ch]Bm/D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch] 
e|-4--4--4--4--2----2--2-4-7-0--0--0------------------------------|
B|-5-----5-----4----3--3-----2--1----1-1--0--2--0------------0--4-|
G|-4-----4-----4----4--------2--2---------1--1----1--4----------4-|
D|---------------------------------------------------4---1-4------|
A|---------------------------------------------------2------------|
E|----------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                     [ch]B/D#[/ch]
    I should have seen it coming when roses died[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm/D[/ch]                                [ch]A[/ch]
    Should have seen the end of summer in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                  [ch]E[/ch]
    I should have listened when you said good night[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]
    You really meant goodbye[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]B/D#[/ch]
    Baby, ain't it funny, how you never ever learn to fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm/D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
    You're really on your knees, when you think you're standing tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
    But only fools are know-it-alls and I played that fool for you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
I cried and I cried[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
There were nights that died for you baby[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
I tried and I tried to deny that your love drove me crazy, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
If the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch] N.C.
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]B/D#[/ch]
    Baby, I thought you and me would stand the test of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm/D[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
    Like we got away with the perfect crime[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
    But we were just a legend in my mind[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
    I guess that I was blind[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]B/D#[/ch]
    Remember those nights dancing at the masquerade[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm/D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
    The clowns wore smiles that wouldn't fade[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
    You and I were the renegades, some things never change[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
It made me so mad cause I wanted it bad for us baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
And now it's so sad that whatever we had, ain't worth saving[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
If the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
If the pain that I'm feeling so strong[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is the reason that I'm holding on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong - this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Solo]
| [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch] |


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
I cried and I cried[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
There were nights that died for you baby[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]C#m[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]
I tried and I tried to deny that your love drove me crazy, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]                      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
If the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
If the pain that I'm feeling so strong[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Is the reason that I'm holding on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong - this ain't a love song[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong - this ain't a love song[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]      N.C.      [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah, I'm wrong - this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Outro]
| [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B/D#[/ch] | [ch]Bm/D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] | [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] | [ch]B[/ch] | (x3)
